notes: Multiple redeclared functions (triggerFright defined 3 times causing JS errors), incomplete/misaligned maze map with only 26 rows instead of 31, ghost house logic is broken with ghosts barely leaving, pac-man movement snapping is erratic, and overall the game is barely playable due to these compounding issues.

Core Pac-Man elements exist, but duplicate fright-function definitions, incomplete state/UI handling, simplistic/bug-prone movement and ghost logic, and several polish/accuracy issues keep this well below a solid benchmark build.
